sources.title: 8 Must-Have Personal Trainer Website Features for 2025
keyInsights: 5-second rule: visitors must understand your offer immediately
70%+ traffic is mobile; booking must be thumb-friendly and under 3 seconds load
Testimonials should use real names, faces, and specific measurable results
Email lead magnets like '5-Day Strength Plan' capture non-converting visitors
About section should lead with 'why' not credentials

sources.title: How to Use Color Psychology for Fitness Websites
keyInsights: 2-4 color maximum including main, accent, and font colors

Black/white base always works as foundation
Color designations should be consistent across all pages

sources.title: 9 Fitness Website Design Ideas for 2025
keyInsights: 94% of users say video helped them make a purchasing decision

sources.title: A Complete Guide to SEO For Personal Trainers
keyInsights: Target high-volume low-competition keywords
Primary keyword in first 100-150 words
Keyword density 0.6-0.8% optimal
Google Business Profile critical for local visibility

sources.title: SEO Content Strategy for Personal Trainers 2025
keyInsights: Intent keywords matching services: 'personal trainer [city]'
One dedicated page per service for clear search targeting
GA4 for behavior tracking, Search Console for query monitoring
Monthly review of top pages and top queries

sources.title: 10 Landing Page Design Tips to Boost Conversions
